title: Plexus Structural Workflow Ignored
description: The AI agent skipped building out the Connectome and running an impact simulation before executing Nudge source code changes.
steps_reproduced: Received a bug report regarding Nudge Undo.
Opened nudge-inject.js directly and patched keydown listeners.
Ignored Plexus-Nudge impact risk simulation entirely.
suggested_improvement: The system should enforce a hard-stop gate requiring a structural simulation report (via Plexus Simulator API) before allowing writes to target source files.
